data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies user choices to decrease decision time and enhance navigation.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined interface with limited actions available per screen.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Ensures that targets (buttons, links) are large and easily tappable.
data.technical_spec: Optimized touch targets for ease of use on touch devices.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Focuses on visual appeal to create a perception of better usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of Instagram's color palette and typography.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design is consistent with patterns from other popular applications like Facebook.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of familiar UI elements like the news feed.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Uses borders and containers to group related content.
data.technical_spec: Card-based layout to organize posts, comments, and stories.
